JOBS report

Darren Cameron

2025-10-21

JOBS pipeline steps

We used JOBS to generate integrate our sc-eQTL TensorQTL nominial data with publically available data Wen et al 2024 to boost our eQTL discovery power. The citation for JOBS is Wang et al. (2025), DOI: 10.1016/j.xgen.2025.100820.

  1. run_jobs: Run Jobs script on TensorQTL nominial eQTL data and public bulk dataset
  2. jobs_report: Calculate per gene FDR (per cell type) and report sig eGenes (i.e. top eSNP per eGene)

Settings:

  • Run on L1 cell type eQTL only
  • Wen input file: devBrain_eQTL_EUR_nominal_50HCP_FDR_0.05.txt.gz
